Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: Hunter pursues a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to kill the participants in his trial.
Video.title: Blow-Up

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison
Video.title: War Zone

Video.summary: When a dying contract killer confesses he was paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter pursues the true murderer.
Video.title: Scrap Metal

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: A teenager's death leads Hunter and McCall to a Fagin who commands a group of barrio boys to commit crimes.
Video.title: Fagin 1986

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.
Video.title: No Good Deed

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit through his most recent heist of a local bank
Video.title: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Image.alt: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby must rely on their maternal instincts when they find a baby left on their doorstep.
Video.title: Baby Makes Three

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby follow a bounty to New York City and experience the perils of being tourists while they track their quarry.
Video.title: Hound Downtown

Video.summary: Reno takes part in a boat race to investigate mysterious crashes.
Video.title: Offshore Thunder

Video.summary: Reno goes undercover to infiltrate a corrupt escort service in order to help Bobby's former fiancee.
Video.title: Studs

Video.summary: When Reno and Cheyenne pose as newlyweds, their intimate feelings for each other become apparent.
Video.title: Another Place And Time

Video.summary: Reno teams up with Dutch Dixon's vengeful son to bring Dutch to justice--but the son may be just as devious as the father.
Video.title: Sins Of The Father

Video.summary: Reno investigates a parolee who claims he was wrongly accused of rape.
Video.title: No Place Like Home

Video.summary: Although Rita objects, a gigolo/killer-turned-writer is released on parole into the custody of his publisher. When the publisher's oversexed wife is found murdered, Rita immediately suspects the parolee but later learns that he's innocent of this crime.
Video.title: Crime Of Love

Video.summary: Three fhends are stalked by a serial killer; Chris worries after turning to Cotton for help with a tax audit.
Video.title: Team Spirit

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: Rita and Chris must protect Donnie 'Dogs' Dibarto from a notorious mobster named Tony 'Toe Tag' Torino, when he attempts to muscle in on a piece of Dibarto's action and Dibarto decides to turn state's evidence. The situation gets further complicated when a Miami cop named Dexter, who's running the investigation on Torino and is suppose to be providing protection for Dibarto may or may not be on the up and up. When the hitters start getting too close, Rita and Chris must try and determine if Dexter is a 'dirty cop' or not.
Video.title: To Serve And Protect

Video.summary: Rita and Chris pursue a call girl killer.
Video.title: Tough Love

Video.summary: A seductive ex-cop tries to blackmail some politically prominent lovers with a tell-all book.
Video.title: Sex, Lies And Yellow Tape

Video.summary: When a man is killed by an intruder, Chris and Rita investigate. They naturally turn their attention to the man's wife. But they later shift their focus on the man's assistant who lives with them. They learn that she's a criminal who's lying low, waiting for the statue of limitations on her crime to run out.
Video.title: Schemes Like Old Times
